name: Lickable Cat Treats (Squeeze Tubes)
description: High-moisture puree cat treats in small tubes. Great for picky eaters and keeping cats hydrated.

name: Fresh Step Clumping Cat Litter
description: Odor-controlling clumping litter suitable for multi-cat homes. Lighter than most competing brands.

description: Cat tree with top perch, two hammocks, scratching post, hanging ball, and condo. Soft faux fur.
